name: Kernel Driver Analysis
description: Static vulnerability analysis tools for Linux and Windows kernel drivers.
longdescription: Collection of Binary Ninja plugins for kernel driver vulnerability research targeting both Linux and Windows. Linux: module entry detection, character device and file_operations enumeration, IOCTL discovery with full _IOC (dir/type/nr/size) decode, and vulnerability triage covering copy_from_user misuse, integer overflows in allocations, missing capability checks, mmap handler flaws, UAF patterns, GFP_KERNEL in IRQ context, and kernel pointer leaks. Windows: device name discovery, CTL_CODE IOCTL enumeration (DeviceType/Access/Function/Method), pool tag extraction, dangerous opcode detection (rdmsr/wrmsr/rdpmc), WinAPI inventory, physical memory and IO space pattern detection, and missing ProbeFor/privilege gate checks.

installinstructions.Darwin: Copy the plugin directory into ~/Library/Application Support/Binary Ninja/plugins/
installinstructions.Windows: Copy the plugin directory into %APPDATA%\Binary Ninja\plugins\
